ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Display name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation score reflecting the user's contributions */,
  "profile_link" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile page */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the tag belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tags" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the user */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions the user has with the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the contribution */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contribution */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the user's contribution */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the contribution has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the contribution has received */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the contribution */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the contribution was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Moderator, Member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new follower, upvote) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., contribution, comment, like) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
